meta.documentTitle: London Rising RP | British Roleplay Server
meta.documentDescription: London Rising RP is a premium British-themed roleplay server with immersive civilian careers, active emergency services, and serious story-driven gameplay.

mobileDrawer.eyebrow: British themed. Story driven. Always evolving.

footer.tagline: A cinematic British roleplay experience built for long-form character stories.
footer.closingLine: Built to welcome new stories in every session.
